query: Show me the busiest contractors by zip this year

steps.rationale: Group permits by contractor and zip code for this year to determine the busiest contractors.

answer: The busiest contractors this year by zip code include IES Residential, Inc., which completed 101 permits in zip code 78747 and 96 in 78660. In Charge Electrical Services followed with 88 permits in 78747, while Landmark Electric handled 84 permits in 78744. The zip codes with the highest overall activity were 78744 with 164 permits and 78747 with 140 permits.
